title: Exact Descriptive Statistics Witnesses
graduation_criteria: Encode exact finite descriptive-statistics checks as deterministic QF_LRA/LIA formulas.
Replay count-table and finite-data witnesses through Axeyum model evaluation.
Route impossible exact-rational statistic constraints through QF_LRA/Farkas certificates.
Route inconsistent integer margin/count constraints through QF_LIA/Diophantine certificates.
Keep statistical inference and numerical estimation under explicit reproducibility metadata, not proof status.
Add exact finite-test examples only after the table helpers are reused by another statistics pack.
